allow: PowerShell($git = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "git: " + $\(if \($git\) { $git.Source } else { "NOT FOUND" }\); $gh = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "gh: " + $\(if \($gh\) { $gh.Source } else { "NOT FOUND" }\); if \($gh\) { gh auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5 })

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; if \(Test-Path $gh\) { "found: $gh"; & $gh --version | Select-Object -First 1; & $gh auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3 } else { "not at default path; searching..."; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Recurse -Filter gh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName })
